SYNTHETIC FIXTURE - NOT A RECORDED DEED. For parser testing only.

Part of the Southwest Quarter of Section 30, Township 16 North, Range 2 East,
Hendricks County, Indiana, described as follows:

Beginning at a point of beginning;

thence North 00 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds East, 250.00 feet;
thence Northeasterly along a curve to the right having a radius of 400.00
feet, an arc length of 209.44 feet, and a chord bearing North 15 degrees 00
minutes 00 seconds East, 207.06 feet;
thence North 30 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds East, 180.00 feet;
thence Southeasterly along a curve to the right having a radius of 250.00
feet, an arc length of 130.90 feet, and a chord bearing South 75 degrees 00
minutes 00 seconds East, 129.41 feet;
thence South 60 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds East, 200.00 feet;
thence South 45 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds West, 600.00 feet;
thence North 75 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds West, 220.00 feet to the Point
of Beginning.
